extracted.title: TE Operational Flow Order -- UPDATE
extracted.description:
In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, TE is updating the previously posted Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 4.3 of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 3, 2026, to all OBA and Transportation Contracts, with the exception of those governed by a FERC gas tariff, in Texas Eastern's Market Area Zones M2-24, M2-30 and M3.

Additionally, effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 3, 2026, TE is lifting all previously posted Operational Flow Order (OFO) for Texas Eastern's Access Area Zones ETX, STX, WLA & ELA.

This OFO does not affect the ability of TE to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline.

Please refer to the table below for the effected TETCO zones, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Zone / Gas Day Feb 1 & Feb 2 / Gas Day Feb 3 and until further notice:
M1-24": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250
M1-30": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250
M2-24": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 2%/250 / OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250
M2-30": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 2%/250 / OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250
M3: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 2%/250 / OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250
ETX: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / No OFO
STX: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / No OFO
WLA: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / No OFO
ELA: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 5%/250 / No OFO
Customer Specific: No OFO / No OFO

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled

The penalty will be equal to three times the daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for the geographical region, as defined in Section 8.5(a) of the General Terms and Conditions of TE's FERC Gas Tariff for the day on which such violation occurred. TE will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty except for shippers who can acquire day ending Due Shipper supply for No Due Pipe OFO's and Due Pipe supply for Due Shipper OFO's.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
